# Protector of Lórien

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Title.*

---

Attach to a hero.
**Action:** Discard a card from your hand to give attached hero +1 DEF or +1 WP until the end of the phase. Limit 3 times per phase.
